user_system_path: Repo cleanup (#524): stale branch deletion, stub workflow retirement, dated docs archive, ghost governance ref removal, SESSION_HISTORY/LESSONS_LEARNED relocation to docs/archive/, cleanup-branch gate exemption. Allow-by-default contract; all product/gate work deferred to #537/#538/#539/#541.
allowed_files_raw: Allow-by-default-minus-forbidden (friction reduction, owner-directed 2026-06-22). The contract no longer pins a narrow per-seam whitelist that blocks owner-authorized fixes outside the active seam. The real guard is forbidden_file_patterns + the proof doctrine, not a whitelist. Small owner-directed hotfixes (e.g. the Microsoft guest #EXT# email self-heal in lib/sync + lib/ui shipped on this branch) no longer require displacing the active seam.
forbidden_files_raw: HARD RAILS (unchanged by the allow-by-default switch): No Stripe, Scout, schema/migration, or secrets changes. No auto-send. No BLIND loosening of positive_winner_contract or the discrepancy-card quality gate (the #452 'hollow drafts' mistake) — every gate change carries a test + before/after read.
required_local_proof: npm run gate:continuity && npm run typecheck (roll-forward); for #518 code work additionally: npx vitest run lib/briefing/__tests__/
required_browser_proof: Live (owner): after the 11:00 UTC morning-pipeline cron, pipeline_runs.outcome flips from generation_failed_sentinel to generation_returned for 2cbc1bab, and a real (non-fixture) verdict card appears on the dashboard.
browser_proof_command: manual: wait for / trigger the morning-pipeline cron, then query pipeline_runs for outcome=generation_returned and confirm the dashboard verdict is a real grounded move (not pipe_test, not an anchor hold).
acceptance_condition: Control-plane rolled to #518 with gate:continuity green; the next session can confirm the live verdict via cron and, if needed, calibrate the remaining gates with proof. No blind loosening.
anti_regression_checks: no edits under app/api/stripe, lib/scout, supabase/migrations
any positive_winner_contract / discrepancy-card change carries a unit test + before/after read
stop_condition: Session-closeout roll-forward lands on claude/verdict-calibration-518 -> main; #518 captures the live-verification + gate-calibration work. gate:continuity + typecheck green.
next_command: Next session: read #518. Check pipeline_runs for the owner after the 11:00 UTC cron (expect generation_returned). If still SAFE_SILENCE, calibrate missing_schedule_resolution_context / goal-drift anchor / discrepancy-card-frame weak_risk with test+replay proof. Owner: set Vercel OWNER_USER_ID/FOLDERA_SELF_USER_ID -> 2cbc1bab-8e0e-43b0-bf4a-9a0cd6b5d91f; consider raising/segmenting the manual directive cap. Also standing: Scout #494 activation; OneDrive whole-drive enumeration (#507).
